task_focus: Collaboration-bus QA: protocol, ledgers, append semantics, adoption workflow, bundle source_refs (review-only)

consensus_findings.schema_versioning: Field is named 'version':'1.0' (bin/stampede.sh:685), not 'schema_version'; no semver/migration policy.
consensus_findings.missing_event_kind_adoption: Workflow lists 'adopt' (bin/stampede.sh:705-707) but ledger_events defines only proposal/peer_review/improvement/consensus/broadcast (bin/stampede.sh:671-683). No adoptions.jsonl exists.
consensus_findings.no_envelope_fields: No msg_id, parent_msg_id, seq, from, to, kind, payload, signature in protocol; no per-event payload schemas.
consensus_findings.single_source_of_truth_absent: No docs/protocol.md or docs/collaboration-bus.md; protocol exists only as runtime-generated JSON + injected prompt at bin/stampede.sh:910.
consensus_findings.commander_agent_lacks_bus_docs: agents/stampede-commander.agent.md has no mention of collaboration-bus, the 6 phases, or ledger files; relies on runtime prompt injection.
consensus_findings.ledger_creation: bin/stampede.sh:671-683 mkdirs collab/ and touches 5 ledgers via open(path,'a').close(); robust to repeat launches when run dir exists.
consensus_findings.monitor_visibility: bin/stampede-monitor.sh:32-39 + 57-66 use wc -l on the 5 ledgers; no JSON parse, no adopt count, malformed lines silently inflate counts.
consensus_findings.append_only_enforcement: protocol.json (bin/stampede.sh:695-703) documents append-only/never-truncate. Records consistently end with '\n'. Truncation HAZARD: child-agents.jsonl opened with 'w' at bin/stampede.sh:853 during fleet seed (subsequent writes at :1023-1024 are 'a').
consensus_findings.atomic_writes: Atomic rename (.tmp + os.replace) used consistently for non-JSONL artifacts (bin/stampede.sh:155-157, 664-668, 1016-1018; agents/stampede-agent.agent.md:238-242; agents/stampede-merger.agent.md:300-304).
consensus_findings.no_locking: No flock/umask/chmod policy for collab ledgers; concurrency relies on O_APPEND atomicity (safe given small record sizes < PIPE_BUF) and prompt-level guidance.
consensus_findings.phase_enforcement: All 6 phases are advisory; no quorum, timeout, or required predecessor IDs; nothing prevents skipping consensus before broadcast or adoption without broadcast.
consensus_findings.merger_blind_to_collab: agents/stampede-merger.agent.md (esp. :49-53) reads only {RUN_DIR}/results/*.json; zero collab/ledger consumption; no provenance chain from bundle items to ledger entries.
consensus_findings.bundle_shape_gaps: agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:240-267 Bundle Shape required_fields = [task_id, run_id, commander_id, status, role, profile, swarm_scale, per_commander_full_swarm, branch, files_changed, summary, confidence, consensus, telemetry]. MISSING: source_refs, adopted_consensus, proposal_ids, review_ids, improvement_ids, broadcast_ids.
consensus_findings.source_refs_runtime_only: source_refs requirement appears only in protocol required_fields list and prose at bin/stampede.sh:910; not in agent contract; no validator.
consensus_findings.atom_evidence_inconsistency: Existing atoms in this run mix prose 'file:line' strings (atm-001.json) with structured {path,lines,note} objects (wkr-006-001.json); no uniform schema.

consensus_gaps: Schema field named 'version' instead of 'schema_version'; no semver/migration policy.
No envelope fields (msg_id, parent_msg_id, seq, from, to, kind, payload, signature) and no per-event payload schemas.
Adoption phase has no event kind, no adoptions.jsonl ledger, and no monitor count; recorded only inline in bundle.json.
No docs/collaboration-bus.md or docs/protocol.md as single source of truth.
stampede-commander.agent.md does not document the bus, 6 phases, or ledgers; survival depends on runtime prompt injection at bin/stampede.sh:910.
child-agents.jsonl opened with mode 'w' at bin/stampede.sh:853 during fleet seed — truncation hazard on relaunch.
Monitor uses wc -l only; no JSON validation, no truncation canary, no per-kind validity checks.
No flock/umask/chmod for collab ledgers; correctness depends on O_APPEND + agent compliance.
Phase ordering is advisory; no quorum/timeout/required-predecessor enforcement.
Merger does not consume collab ledgers; no link from bundle items back to ledger msg_ids.
No JSON Schema for bundle or ledger lines and no runtime validator.
Worker atom evidence format not standardized.
consensus_recommendations: Author docs/collaboration-bus.md as canonical SoT covering envelope, per-event payloads, phase semantics, and append-only contract.
Rename protocol field 'version' → 'schema_version'; adopt semver and bump on envelope change.
Add envelope: {schema_version, msg_id, parent_msg_id, seq, ts, from, to, kind, payload, signature?}; ship per-kind JSON Schemas under schemas/.
Introduce 'adoption' event kind and adoptions.jsonl ledger; surface count in stampede-monitor.sh; require adoptions to reference broadcast_id and consensus item_id.
Embed bus protocol summary directly in agents/stampede-commander.agent.md (do not rely on runtime prompt injection only).
Change bin/stampede.sh:853 child-agents.jsonl init from 'w' to 'a' (or rotate before re-init) to honor append-only contract.
Add lightweight JSONL validator + truncation canary in bin/stampede-monitor.sh (read-only).
Add Bundle Shape fields source_refs, adopted_consensus, proposal_ids, review_ids, improvement_ids, broadcast_ids to agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:240-267; ship schemas/bundle.schema.json.
Extend agents/stampede-merger.agent.md to consume collab/*.jsonl ledgers, validate bundle source_refs against ledger msg_ids, and report adopted consensus explicitly.
Standardize worker atom evidence format as {file, line_start, line_end, excerpt} to enforce traceable provenance.
